eval_results.name: full-cycle-execution
eval_results.key_finding: All 10 phase steps executed in correct A→B→C→D order

eval_results.name: partial-cycle-ab
eval_results.key_finding: Phase A+B executed correctly; Phase C and D skipped as requested

eval_results.name: preset-workflow-feature
eval_results.key_finding: 'new-feature' preset loaded correctly: full cycle with spec creation and branch management

eval_results.name: preset-workflow-bugfix
eval_results.key_finding: 'bugfix' preset correctly skips Phase A spec creation, executes B+C

eval_results.name: phase-skip-logic
eval_results.key_finding: State-aware skip: Phase A bypassed because A.3 already completed and OpenSpec exists

strengths: Correct Ten-Step Cycle phase ordering (A→B→C→D invariant maintained)
Flexible partial cycle execution without breaking phase invariants
Preset support reduces configuration overhead for common workflows
State-aware skip logic avoids redundant phase re-execution
Clear phase execution log with timestamps for auditability
weaknesses: Preset registry is hardcoded — no user-defined preset support yet
Phase skip logic requires accurate state input; stale state causes incorrect skips
recommendations: Add user-defined preset support via .aria/presets.yaml configuration
Integrate with state-scanner for automatic phase skip detection
Add dry-run mode to preview phase execution plan before running
